tips: Remove all wall hooks, nails, and adhesive strips.
Fill and touch up nail/screw holes if you have matching paint.
Wipe down marks and scuffs — check behind doors and furniture.
Vacuum thoroughly, including edges and under furniture.
Steam clean carpets — keep the receipt as evidence if your lease requires it.
Mop hard floors and check for scuffs near doorways.
Dust and wipe down blinds slat by slat.
Check for and repair any broken cords or missing slats.
Launder curtains if machine-washable, or spot-clean stains.
Clean the oven interior, racks, and door glass — a very common exit claim.
Clean the stovetop and rangehood filter.
Wipe down splashbacks near the cooktop.
Scrub grout lines in the bathroom and kitchen to remove mould/mildew.
Re-seal or clean silicone around the shower/bath if discoloured.
Check the exhaust fan is dust-free and working.
Mow the lawn and edge garden beds.
Sweep paths, driveway, and clear gutters if accessible.
